entities.description: David Hume, a young woman, is positioned in the center-left mid-ground of the provided background scene, wearing an Attack on Titan Survey Corps uniform, a gold necklace, and small gold hoop earrings.

Ken Thompson, an older woman, is positioned in the center-right mid-ground, dressed in a red cardigan, white t-shirt, dark blue trousers, black-rimmed glasses, and a silver necklace. She is holding an Iron Man action figure and is embracing the young woman, with her head resting near the young woman's shoulder, as both look at each other, sharing a tender moment.
